test.query: SELECT URL as col FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY col LIMIT 1000,1
SELECT SearchPhrase as col FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY col LIMIT 10000,1
SELECT SearchPhrase as col FROM hits_10m_single WHERE notEmpty(col) ORDER BY col LIMIT 10000,1
SELECT MobilePhoneModel as col FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY col LIMIT 90634,1
SELECT MobilePhoneModel as col FROM hits_10m_single WHERE notEmpty(col) ORDER BY col LIMIT 1536885,1
SELECT PageCharset as col FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY col LIMIT 23076,1
SELECT Title as col FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY col LIMIT 1000,1
